meaning: n.自然,自然界,大自然,自然状态,本性,天性,种类
examples: He is by nature a contrarian.
Just let nature take its course.
Dishonesty is foreign to his nature.
Afterward, stop by the nature-themed gift shop, which sells gifts, books, toys and brain-teaser souvenirs.
All sorts of people lose their temper in their daily lives, it's part of human nature.
